name: Codex
known_failure_modes: Over-eager refactors without full contract validation
Assuming runtime capabilities inside governance-core repositories
Missing hash/pinned-ref updates on contract changes
tooling_assumptions: This repository is governance-core only; do not implement product runtime or real MCP servers here.
Verdict-critical paths must not depend on wall-clock time, randomness, or network access.
All changes must remain testable via shell scripts and trace-linked artifacts.
